'''âs-z-ng''' ('''kasazang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quarrell|quarrell]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-z-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quarrell|quarrell]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-z-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kasazang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisazang|thisazang]] || [[word:jisazang|jisazang]] || [[word:shisazang|shisazang]] || [[word:kisazang|kisazang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusazang|thuthusazang]] || [[word:jujusazang|jujusazang]] || [[word:shushusazang|shushusazang]] || [[word:kukusazang|kukusazang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusazang|thusazang]] || [[word:jusazang|jusazang]] || [[word:shusazang|shusazang]] || [[word:kusazang|kusazang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusazang|thusazang]] || [[word:jusazang|jusazang]] || [[word:shusazang|shusazang]] || [[word:kusazang|kusazang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesazang|thesazang]] || [[word:jesazang|jesazang]] || [[word:shesazang|shesazang]] || [[word:kesazang|kesazang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosazang|thothosazang]] || [[word:jojosazang|jojosazang]] || [[word:shoshosazang|shoshosazang]] || [[word:kokosazang|kokosazang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosazang|thosazang]] || [[word:josazang|josazang]] || [[word:shosazang|shosazang]] || [[word:kosazang|kosazang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosazang|thosazang]] || [[word:josazang|josazang]] || [[word:shosazang|shosazang]] || [[word:kosazang|kosazang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsazang|thĂŠsazang]] || [[word:jĂŠsazang|jĂŠsazang]] || [[word:shĂŠsazang|shĂŠsazang]] || [[word:kĂŠsazang|kĂŠsazang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasazang|thathasazang]] || [[word:jajasazang|jajasazang]] || [[word:shashasazang|shashasazang]] || [[word:kakasazang|kakasazang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasazang|thasazang]] || [[word:jasazang|jasazang]] || [[word:shasazang|shasazang]] || [[word:kasazang|kasazang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasazang|thasazang]] || [[word:jasazang|jasazang]] || [[word:shasazang|shasazang]] || [[word:kasazang|kasazang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasazang|shasazang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasazang|goshasazang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasazang|gokishasazang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasazangnĂŒ|shasazangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasazangnknĂŒ|goshasazangnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasazangnĂŒ|gokishasazangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasazangshĂ«|shasazangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasazangnkshĂ«|goshasazangnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasazangshĂ«|gokishasazangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasazangro|shasazangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasazangnkro|goshasazangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasazangro|gokishasazangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasazangmu|shasazangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasazangnkmu|goshasazangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasazangmu|gokishasazangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasazangsher|shasazangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasazangnksher|goshasazangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasazangsher|gokishasazangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasazang|shasazang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasazangnkng|goshasazangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasazang|gokishasazang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasazangya|shasazangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasazangnkya|goshasazangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasazangya|gokishasazangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasazangyam|shasazangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasazangnkyam|goshasazangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasazangyam|gokishasazangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasazangnĂŒshĂ«|shasazangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasazangnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasazangnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasazangnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasazangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasazangnĂŒro|shasazangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasazangnknĂŒro|goshasazangnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasazangnĂŒro|gokishasazangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasazangnĂŒmu|shasazangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasazangnknĂŒmu|goshasazangnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasazangnĂŒmu|gokishasazangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasazangshĂ«nĂŒ|shasazangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasazangnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasazangnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasazangshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasazangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasazangshĂ«ro|shasazangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasazangnkshĂ«ro|goshasazangnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasazangshĂ«ro|gokishasazangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasazangshĂ«mu|shasazangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasazangnkshĂ«mu|goshasazangnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasazangshĂ«mu|gokishasazangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasazangronĂŒ|shasazangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasazangnkronĂŒ|goshasazangnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasazangronĂŒ|gokishasazangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasazangroshĂ«|shasazangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasazangnkroshĂ«|goshasazangnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasazangroshĂ«|gokishasazangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasazangromu|shasazangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasazangnkromu|goshasazangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasazangromu|gokishasazangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasazangmunĂŒ|shasazangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasazangnkmunĂŒ|goshasazangnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasazangmunĂŒ|gokishasazangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasazangmushĂ«|shasazangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasazangnkmushĂ«|goshasazangnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasazangmushĂ«|gokishasazangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasazangmuro|shasazangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasazangnkmuro|goshasazangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasazangmuro|gokishasazangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
